name: A Voyage of Discovery: The Ocean Race
original_name: A Voyage of Discovery: The Ocean Race
overview: Follow The Ocean Race and the incredible journeys of its five teams in 2023. With behind-the-scenes access, the protagonists from each team demonstrate the unique challenges and drama faced during sailing’s toughest round-the-world race.

trailers.title: A Voyage of Discovery | The Ocean Race Documentary Teaser Trailer
